blurb: Law-firm AI/regulatory practice. Launch coverage uses first-party EU AI Act analysis.

publications.title: The Commission's Draft High-Risk AI Guidelines under the EU AI Act: A First Read
publications.summary: Bird & Bird analyses the European Commission’s draft high-risk AI guidelines under the EU AI Act, including the threshold question of what qualifies as an AI system and how high-risk obligations are expected to operate.

publications.title: European Union Artificial Intelligence (EU AI Act) Guide
publications.summary: Bird & Bird publishes a guide to the AI Act covering scope, high-risk systems, GPAI, transparency, sandboxes, governance and enforcement.

publications.title: Taking the EU AI Act to Practice: Reading the Commission’s Draft Article 50 Guidelines
publications.summary: Bird & Bird analyses the Commission draft Article 50 transparency guidelines for AI systems under Regulation (EU) 2024/1689.
